detectors.description:
Reentrancy in FalloutThree._transfer(address,address,uint256) (FalloutThree.sol#679-803):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (FalloutThree.sol#743)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (FalloutThree.sol#817-829)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (FalloutThree.sol#749)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (FalloutThree.sol#837)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (FalloutThree.sol#801)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (FalloutThree.sol#973)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (FalloutThree.sol#953)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (FalloutThree.sol#955)
	FalloutThree._rOwned (FalloutThree.sol#355) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- FalloutThree._takeTeam(uint256) (FalloutThree.sol#967-975)
	- FalloutThree._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (FalloutThree.sol#927-963)
	- FalloutThree.balanceOf(address) (FalloutThree.sol#505-509)
	- FalloutThree.constructor() (FalloutThree.sol#439-469)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (FalloutThree.sol#801)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (FalloutThree.sol#981)
	FalloutThree._rTotal (FalloutThree.sol#367) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- FalloutThree._getCurrentSupply() (FalloutThree.sol#1123-1133)
	- FalloutThree._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (FalloutThree.sol#979-985)
	- FalloutThree.constructor() (FalloutThree.sol#439-469)
	- FalloutThree.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (FalloutThree.sol#601-623)
